title: Rewrite the entire TextProcessor as a pipe-based module
prompt: Refactor all three functions in test_fixtures/intermediate_vars.ex (`normalize/1`, `slugify/1`, `summary/1`) so every function body is a single `|>` pipeline. No intermediate variables. Output a complete `defmodule MyApp.TextProcessor do ... end`.
tier_rationale: Three-function module-wide refactor; `summary/1` has the trickiest step because concatenating the `...` suffix needs `Kernel.<>/2` piping.
